# PMB WSL fallback repair

metadata:
- checkpoint_id: checkpoint-7637cd4eef27
- project_id: codex-workspace
- change_type: maintenance
- created_at: 2026-07-19T13:43:08.011618+00:00

## Summary
Restored Hub-first PMB with a governed WSL read-only fallback using the Windows PMB runtime and WAL-safe validation.

## Changed Files
- workspace/_bridge/docs/maintenance_surface_map.md
- workspace/_bridge/local_pmb_memory.py
- workspace/_bridge/local_pmb_memory_platform.py
- workspace/_bridge/local_pmb_memory_process_tests.py

- /home/codexlab/.codex-app/runtime/work-git-change-owner/commit-pmb-wal-read-validation.json

## Verification
- PMB 523/523/523
- CodeGraph fresh
- Work Git and bare main synchronized

## Backups
- /home/codexlab/.codex-app/backups/work-git/202607/pmb-wsl-fallback/20260719-133547-185816-070d710e-local-edit/manifest.json

## Stable Conclusions
- Hub remains primary
- WSL fallback reuses the Windows PMB runtime and never copies PMB databases into WSL.

## Followups
- none recorded

# Adopt WSL Work Git as the active authority

metadata:
- checkpoint_id: checkpoint-ad13d42c2635
- project_id: codex-work-environment
- change_type: maintenance
- created_at: 2026-07-18T02:33:46.861590+00:00

## Summary
WSL worktree and Windows bare Git are now the only active Work Git; codex-env-mirror consumes only a clean synchronized release receipt and remains a one-way recovery product.

- all targeted validators passed

## Verification
- none recorded

## Backups
- C:/Users/45543/Downloads/mcsmanager_windows_release/mcsmanager/_bridge/backups/manual/202607/governance/20260718-022842-local-edit/manifest.json

## Stable Conclusions
- Normal authority flow is WSL worktree -> Windows bare Git -> owner validation -> closeout -> mirror
- reverse overwrite is blocked.
